description: RIPT Essentials have introduced the iconic boys swim shorts. Made with ultra-light materials and quick drying fabric, you will be kept comfortable whilst maintaining maximum flexibility and the added convenience of drying off in the sun quickly. With an inside leg length of 9 cm, these mid length shorts have an upgraded mesh lined fabric and an elasticated waistband, perfect for all shapes and sizes of wearers. RIPT Essentials have created these swimming shorts with ultimate sun protection, with SPF50 sun protection, your skin will be protected even further by absorbing the suns rays as much as possible. With a matching father-son set, these swimming trunks are the fashion trend you won't want to miss.
